title: Distinguish Rust frame buffer exhaustion
description: LichenFrame::write_to currently returns FrameTooLarge both for a protocol body over 254 bytes and for a caller-provided output buffer that is too small. Add a distinct non-breaking error path or planned API revision so callers can determine whether retrying with a larger buffer can succeed.
close_reason: Distinguished via new BufferTooSmall variant in FrameError; updated write_to impl, serializer test, error handling; cargo test and clippy pass for lichen-core and lichen-link.
